tasks.subject: Task 6: Extract shared overlay core (src/overlay/)
tasks.description:
Move backend-agnostic overlay code (overlay_ui/state_client/gating/fade) into a src/overlay/ static lib behind IAvatarTextures + Extent2D; rebuild the Vulkan layer on top; all existing tests pass. See plan Task 6 for full steps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/overlay/iavatar_textures.hpp", "src/overlay/meson.build", "src/overlay/overlay_ui.cpp", "src/overlay/overlay_ui.hpp", "src/overlay/state_client.cpp", "src/overlay/state_client.hpp", "src/overlay/gating.cpp", "src/overlay/gating.hpp", "src/overlay/fade.hpp", "src/layer/avatar_textures.hpp", "src/layer/imgui_renderer.cpp", "src/layer/meson.build", "meson.build", "tests/meson.build"], "verifyCommand": "meson setup --reconfigure build . --buildtype=release && meson compile -C build && meson test -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["overlay_ui has no Vk/Vulkan token", "IAvatarTextures = lookup + get_or_load only", "all 22 existing tests pass", "libchoir_overlay.so exports only 3 vk* symbols"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: GL renderer + GlAvatarTextures + vendored imgui_impl_opengl3
tasks.description:
Per-context ImGui-OpenGL frame driver + GL avatar-texture cache (IAvatarTextures impl) + vendored imgui_impl_opengl3 in a static lib; reuse shared draw_overlay. Delivers code + clean compile. See plan Task 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/gl/gl_api.hpp", "src/gl/gl_api.cpp", "src/gl/imgui_impl_opengl3_unity.cpp", "src/gl/gl_renderer.cpp", "src/gl/gl_renderer.hpp", "src/gl/gl_avatar_textures.cpp", "src/gl/gl_avatar_textures.hpp", "src/gl/meson.build", "meson.build"], "verifyCommand": "meson setup --reconfigure build . --buildtype=release && meson compile -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GlAvatarTextures uploads RGBA8 + caches + shutdown deletes", "gl_renderer drives NewFrame->draw_overlay->RenderDrawData with sane clamp", "choir_gl_objs compiles with no GL/EGL/GLX dev headers", "no GL/EGL/GLX system include in src/gl/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: GL interposer (libchoir_gl.so)
tasks.description:
LD_PRELOAD lib hooking eglSwapBuffers/glXSwapBuffers (+ damage, destroy, dlsym/*GetProcAddress); gate via shared gating/StateClient; lazy per-context GlRenderer+GlAvatarTextures; draw; real swap; never crash. See plan Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/gl/interposer.cpp", "src/gl/choir_gl.version", "src/gl/meson.build"], "verifyCommand": "meson compile -C build && ldd build/src/gl/libchoir_gl.so | grep -E 'libEGL|libGLX'; nm -CD build/src/gl/libchoir_gl.so | grep ' T '", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no libEGL/libGLX in ldd", "exports only the 10 hook symbols, no ImGui/choir globals", "dlsym chains via dlvsym without recursion", "gate->lazy-init->draw->real-swap; failure->skip->real-swap", "ctx map mutex-guarded; destroy hooks free state"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Headless EGL golden test
tasks.description:
Offscreen EGL pbuffer GL context; render overlay (one real avatar) through GlRenderer+GlAvatarTextures; glReadPixels; assert it drew. Exit 77 SKIP if no EGL. See plan Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/gl/test_gl_golden.cpp", "tests/meson.build"], "verifyCommand": "meson setup --reconfigure build . --buildtype=release && meson test -C build gl_golden -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EGL pbuffer + RGBA8 FBO; exit 77 SKIP when no context", "synthetic Snapshot + on-disk avatar pre-loaded", "panel-region pixel != bg AND far-corner = bg", "registered under build_tests and passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: choir-run wrapper + packaging
tasks.description:
Per-launch injector choir-run (LD_PRELOAD libchoir_gl.so, baked absolute path, CHOIR_GL_LIB override); install/package the GL lib + wrapper; PKGBUILD pkgdesc mentions OpenGL. See plan Task 9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packaging/choir-run.in", "meson.build", "packaging/install-user.sh", "packaging/PKGBUILD"], "verifyCommand": "meson install --destdir \"$PWD/stage\" -C build && find stage -name libchoir_gl.so -o -name choir-run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["choir-run baked absolute LD_PRELOAD, appends, exec", "CHOIR_GL_LIB override", "meson install places lib + wrapper", "PKGBUILD packages both; pkgdesc mentions OpenGL"]}
```
